sentences.english: I eat fast food way more than I should.
sentences.korean: 패스트푸드를 먹어야 할 것보다 훨씬 많이 먹어요.

sentences.english: It's so quick and cheap that it's hard to resist.
I stopped eating fast food two years ago and I feel so much healthier.
sentences.korean: 2년 전에 패스트푸드를 끊었고 훨씬 건강해진 느낌이에요.

sentences.english: My skin cleared up and I have more energy.
I only eat fast food when I'm traveling, because sometimes there's no other option.
sentences.korean: 여행할 때만 패스트푸드를 먹어요. 가끔 다른 선택지가 없어서요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
